brand.tagline: Four levels of shopping, dining, wellness, services and community.
brand.positioningStatement: Pine Plaza is a four-level retail, dining, wellness, service, and community destination in the heart of Palisades Park, serving Bergen County’s Korean-American community with convenient access and four levels of structured underground parking.
brand.positioningStatementKorean: 파인 플라자는 팰리세이즈파크 중심에 위치한 4층 규모의 쇼핑, 다이닝, 웰니스, 서비스 및 커뮤니티 공간입니다.

hours.generalHours: Open daily. Individual tenant hours may vary.
hours.koreanNote: 입점 업체별 영업시간은 다를 수 있습니다.

leasing.leasingHeadline: Bring your business to Pine Plaza!
leasing.leasingIntro: Pine Plaza offers a unique location in one of Bergen County’s most active Korean-American commercial corridors, with multi-level retail access, structured parking, elevators, and a diverse tenant mix.
leasing.leasingIntroKorean: 파인 플라자는 버겐카운티의 활발한 한인 상권 중심에 위치한 다층 상업 공간입니다.
leasing.availabilityNote: For leasing inquiries, space availability, and partnership opportunities, please contact Pine Plaza management.
leasing.operatorLanguage: Pine Plaza welcomes inquiries from diverse operators—ranging from retail and dining to wellness and medical, and many more

banquetHall.headline: Banquet Hall & Event Reservations
banquetHall.description: Located on the 4th floor, Pine Plaza’s banquet hall is available for private events, large meetings, weddings, sweet sixteens, community gatherings, and special occasions.
banquetHall.descriptionKorean: 4층에 위치한 파인 플라자 연회장은 각종 행사, 대형 모임, 결혼식, 스위트 식스틴, 커뮤니티 모임 등에 이용 가능합니다.
